title: To Dianeme. A Ceremony In Gloucester.
content:
I'll to thee a simnel bring,
    'Gainst thou go'st a-mothering:
    So that when she blesseth thee,
    Half that blessing thou'lt give me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "To Dianeme. A Ceremony In Gloucester.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
